products.name: Beyond 12
products.descriptor: Airside flight termination unit with satellite modem for the Beyond system

evidence.snippet: Beyond 12 is the airside unit for the Beyond system. The options are with or without Iridium connection, with or without secondary link, and with or without internal radio. At least one link must be selected.
Delivery time depends on our stock and choice of options. Typically between 2 and 4 weeks.

products.name: Beyond Base Single
products.descriptor: Handheld ground base station for activating Beyond flight termination

evidence.snippet: Beyond Base Single is the base station for the Beyond system. The options are with or without Iridium connection, with or without secondary link, and with or without internal radio. At least one link must be selected.
Delivery time depends on our stock and choice of options. Typically between 2 and 4 weeks.

products.name: Iridium satcom
products.descriptor: Annual Iridium satellite communication service plan for Beyond system

products.name: Beyond 22
products.descriptor: Advanced flight termination unit with geofencing, 8-signal interrupt, and CAN bus filtering

evidence.snippet:
Prices to be determined
Expected to be commercially available in Q3, 2026.

products.name: Beyond Base Multi
products.descriptor: Multi-drone ground base station supporting up to 12 Beyond 22 airside units

evidence.snippet: Up to 12 Beyond 22s can be controlled from the same Beyond Base Multi, allowing the operator to have a single base even when multiple drones are flying at the same time.

unresolved_questions: Beyond Base Multi has no dedicated product page — it is mentioned only once on the products listing page (resource-0002, line 74) as the companion base station for Beyond 22. Readiness is set to unknown; it will likely become available alongside Beyond 22 (expected Q3 2026).
Beyond 22 is pre-production ('Expected to be commercially available in Q3, 2026', prices TBD); classified as prototype. No dedicated product page exists in the corpus.
